data.title: Northern Light
data.description: Chasing the aurora across Scandinavian wilderness. Over three winters spent in northern Norway and Iceland, this collection documents the raw beauty of the Arctic — from the ethereal glow of the northern lights to the silent grandeur of snow-covered fjords.

images.alt: Vivid green aurora borealis over a mountain lake
Northern lights dancing above a snow-covered forest
Purple and green aurora reflected in still fjord waters
Lone cabin beneath a starry Arctic sky
